description: Pro section lists /nemp:export --codex/--cursor/--windsurf/--all but the correct Pro commands are /nemp-pro:export --codex etc.
suggested_fix: Replace /nemp:export --codex with /nemp-pro:export --codex (and similarly for --cursor, --windsurf, --all) in the Nemp Pro section of export.md

description: Step 4 confirmation message lists /nemp:export --codex / --cursor / --windsurf / --all instead of the correct /nemp-pro:export --* syntax
suggested_fix: Replace /nemp:export --codex with /nemp-pro:export --codex (and --cursor, --windsurf, --all) in the Step 4 confirmation block

description: marketplace.json plugins[0].version is 0.1.0 but plugin.json declares version 0.3.0 — these must match for correct marketplace indexing
suggested_fix: Update plugins[0].version from 0.1.0 to 0.3.0 in marketplace.json

description: CLAUDE.md structure value says commands/ (20 .md files) but the repo contains 24 command .md files — count became stale as new commands were added after last /nemp:init run
suggested_fix: Run /nemp:export or manually update the structure memory value to reflect 24 command files

description: export.md Pro section uses /nemp:export namespace for Pro features that actually live under /nemp-pro:export, contradicting nemp-pro-export.md which correctly defines the Pro namespace
suggested_fix: Update all /nemp:export --codex/--cursor/--windsurf/--all references in export.md to use /nemp-pro:export --* syntax

description: activate.md confirmation references /nemp:export --codex/--cursor/--windsurf/--all instead of /nemp-pro:export --*, creating inconsistency with the actual Pro command namespace
suggested_fix: Update Step 4 confirmation to use /nemp-pro:export --* syntax for all Pro export flags

description: marketplace.json version 0.1.0 does not match plugin.json version 0.3.0 — two minor versions behind
suggested_fix: Sync marketplace.json version to 0.3.0 to match plugin.json

description: Hook matcher Edit|Write|Bash fires on every single tool invocation. Internal guards exist in post-tool.md but hook setup overhead runs unconditionally on all file edits and shell commands.
suggested_fix: Narrow matcher to Write only since auto-capture and auto-sync exclusively trigger on writes to .nemp/memories.json

description: When auto-capture is enabled, all significant Bash command details are written to .nemp-pro/activity.log without sanitizing for sensitive argument patterns like --token, --key, --password, --secret
suggested_fix: Add a filter step to redact or skip logging Bash commands whose arguments match common sensitive-parameter patterns before appending to activity log

description: Command file declares no allowed-tools in frontmatter; tools used include Bash and AskUserQuestion but are undeclared
suggested_fix: Add allowed-tools: [Bash, Read, Write, AskUserQuestion] to frontmatter

description: Command file declares no allowed-tools in frontmatter; tools used include Bash, Read, Write
suggested_fix: Add allowed-tools: [Bash, Read, Write] to frontmatter

description: More than 10 distinct vague quantifier instances: intelligent, smart, actionable, useful, beautiful, meaningful, valuable, significant, relevant, appropriate — penalty capped at -20
suggested_fix: Replace vague adjectives with concrete descriptions; e.g. replace 'smart drafting' with 'pattern-based drafting' and 'intelligent inference' with 'keyword-to-purpose mapping'

description: 7 vague quantifier instances: intelligent, smart (x4 in section titles), beautiful, relevant
suggested_fix: Replace 'Smart Keyword Expansion' with 'Keyword Expansion Table', 'This is INTELLIGENT!' with concrete explanation, 'Display Beautiful Output' with 'Display Formatted Output'

description: 3 vague quantifier instances: clean, professional, relevant
suggested_fix: Replace 'a clean, professional markdown section' with specific format description

description: 3 vague quantifier instances: clean, professional, helpful
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete descriptors

description: 2 vague quantifier instances: basic (keyword expansion), related (terms)
suggested_fix: Replace 'Basic keyword expansion' with 'literal keyword expansion' and specify what related means explicitly

description: 2 vague quantifier instances: relevant, appropriate
suggested_fix: Replace with specific criteria

description: 2 vague quantifier instances: intelligent (first sentence), relevant
suggested_fix: Replace 'intelligent project analyzer' with 'project stack detector'

description: Entire skill body uses backslash-escaped markdown syntax (\# for headings, \*\* for bold, \_ for italic) which renders as literal backslashes in all standard parsers instead of formatting
suggested_fix: Remove backslash escaping from all markdown syntax characters in the skill body; replace \# with #, \*\* with **, etc.

description: Root SKILL.md has valid frontmatter (name + description) but an empty body — no skill reference content, usage guidance, or memory schema documentation
suggested_fix: Add skill body content describing when to use nemp-memory commands, the memory schema, and key workflows; or merge with skills/nemp-memory/SKILL.md

description: forget.md contains two separate '### 7.' headings in sequence — steps run 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,7 with the second 7 handling multiple-match logic out of sequence
suggested_fix: Renumber the second step 7 to step 9 and add a brief note that it handles a parallel edge case
